chapters.title: Old Bookstore
chapters.content: While exploring an old bookstore, Clara found a dusty map hidden inside a forgotten adventure novel. Strange symbols were drawn across the paper.

chapters.title: The First Clue
chapters.content: The map pointed to a forest outside the city. Curious and excited, Clara packed a flashlight, water, and followed the mysterious directions.

chapters.title: Something Buried
chapters.content: Near an ancient tree, she found a small wooden box buried under the roots. Her adventure had only just begun.
